title: Indrai Fort
tagline: Indrai Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Indrai Fort / Indragiri Fort is a fort located 75 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Indrai Fort / Indragiri Fort is a fort located 75 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra. This fort though is an important fort in the Nashik district but, it is less visited by the trekkers. In Chandwad taluka, there are 4 forts in a line on the Satmal hill range, the Chandwad fort, Indrai fort, Rajdher fort, and Koldher fort. This fort is easy to climb but requires 3 hours to reach the fort.

topPlaces.name: Chandwad
topPlaces.description: Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.

Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.
Chandwad Fort (Chandor fort; चांदवड किल्ला) is located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from Chandwad, Nashik district, of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Indrai Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Indrai Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Indrai Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Indrai Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Indrai Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Indrai Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Indrai Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Indrai Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajdher fort, Chandwad, Chandwad fort.
